issues.title: canonical circuit breaker remains the only current-live deployment blocker
issues.next_action: Keep breaker-first truth on /, /execution, /execution/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and current-state docs until release math actually improves.
issues.action: 先把 current-live blocker 語義切回 circuit breaker release math；在 breaker 未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主 blocker。 recent 50 需至少 15 勝，當前 3 勝，還差 12 勝；同時 streak 必須 < 50。

issues.title: recent canonical 250 rows remains a distribution pathology
issues.next_action: Keep drilling the pathological slice itself instead of diluting the root cause into generic leaderboard or venue discussions.
issues.action: 直接對 recent canonical rows 做 feature variance / distinct-count / target-path drill-down；維持 decision-quality guardrails，並檢查 calibration scope 是否仍被病態 slice 稀釋。 recent_window=250, alerts=['label_imbalance', 'regime_concentration', 'regime_shift'], win_rate=0.0160, delta_vs_full=-0.6087, dominant_regime=bull(94.40%), interpretation=distribution_pathology, avg_pnl=-0.0066, avg_quality=-0.2106, avg_dd_penalty=0.2666, spot_long_win_rate=0.0000, feature_diag=variance:12/56, frozen:3, compressed:9, expected_static:4, overlay_only:1, unexpected_frozen:0, distinct:13, null_heavy:10, tail_streak=18x0 since 2026-04-19 02:56:07.174860 -> 2026-04-19 06:47:15.452349, adverse_streak=191x0 since 2026-04-18 14:33:06.990329 -> 2026-04-19 01:10:17.732530, prev_win_rate=0.04, delta_vs_prev=-0.024, prev_quality=-0.2426, quality_delta_vs_prev=0.032, prev_pnl=-0.0093, pnl_delta_vs_prev=0.0027, top_shift_examples=feat_4h_bb_pct_b(1.025→0.2712,Δσ=2.342)/feat_4h_bias20(3.1729→0.4037,Δσ=1.6746)/feat_4h_rsi14(70.1213→55.5347,Δσ=1.4538), new_compressed=feat_atr_pct, frozen_examples=feat_vix(0.0/1)/feat_dxy(0.0075/3)/feat_nq_return_1h(0.0445/3), compressed_examples=feat_body(0.0/250)/feat_ear(0.0058/248)/feat_tongue(0.0087/250), expected_static_examples=feat_dxy[weekend_macro_market_closed]/feat_nq_return_1h[weekend_macro_market_closed]/feat_nq_return_24h[weekend_macro_market_closed], overlay_only_examples=feat_scales_ssr[research_sparse_source], distinct_examples=feat_vix(1/1435)/feat_dxy(3/3304)/feat_nq_return_1h(3/2864), null_examples=feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0.0)/feat_chorus(0.0)/feat_fin_netflow(0.0), recent_examples=2026-04-19 05:47:02.289562:0:chop:-0.1687/2026-04-19 06:28:27.509197:0:chop:-0.1935/2026-04-19 06:47:15.452349:0:chop:-0.1885, adverse_examples=2026-04-19 00:40:09.929353:0:bull:-0.2753/2026-04-19 01:01:04.227452:0:bull:-0.3173/2026-04-19 01:10:17.732530:0:bull:-0.2383

issues.action: Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.

issues.title: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6076, cv_std=0.1254, cv_worst=0.4450)
issues.action: 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。

issues.title: live predictor decision-quality contract is runtime-blocked by recent pathology, a toxic exact live lane, or a severe narrowed pathology lane
issues.action: 把 hb_predict_probe 納入每輪 heartbeat 驗證，對 exact live lane、當前 calibration scope 與 worst narrowed scope 做 root-cause drill-down；優先檢查 exact lane 是否仍是 ALLOW 但 canonical true-negative share 已偏高，並交叉比對 recent same-scope / narrowed-scope 4H shifts、scope selection、與 execution guardrail 是否只是正確地把壞 pocket 擋下。 live_scope=global, regime=chop/CAUTION, label=D, sample_size=200, window=100, alerts=['label_imbalance'], expected_win_rate=0.015, expected_pnl=-0.0083, expected_quality=-0.2138, layers=1→0, top_shifts=feat_4h_dist_swing_low(3.3696→3.1017)/feat_4h_dist_bb_lower(0.6589→0.6405)/feat_4h_bb_pct_b(0.229→0.221), exact_live_lane=(rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None), scope_matrix=regime_label+regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None,alerts=['no_rows']; regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None,alerts=['no_rows']; regime_label+entry_quality_label:rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None,alerts=['no_rows']; entry_quality_label:rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None,alerts=['no_rows']
